value: Within-LEPA: all BLs concordant. Across genera: largely LEPA-specific (50/82 cols differ from both Brassica AND Arabidopsis dominant residues). Interpretation: drift on a shared LEPA ancestral pool — every BL fixed the most common ancestral allele independently, and that allele family carries LEPA-specific residues at most HV cols (NOT pan-Brassicaceae conserved). This is a drift signature, not selection convergence across genera.
